_doc: Filter rules for visualization/qc.py. Thresholds externalize the hardcoded cutoffs; categories define the classification chain (evaluated top-to-bottom, first match wins) plus display metadata. Edit values here instead of editing qc.py.

thresholds._doc: Numeric cutoffs used by classify(). Units noted inline.
thresholds.static_path_m_doc: Trajectory path length below this (meters) => 'static'. 0.01 = 1 cm.
thresholds.flat_gripper_std_doc: Std dev of finite gripper values below this => 'flat_gripper'. Grip range is roughly [0,1].
thresholds.min_traj_frames_doc: Fewer trajectory frames than this => 'no_traj'. Need >=2 to compute path length.

categories._doc: Ordered classification chain. classify() evaluates categories in the listed order; first match wins. priority drives sort within a session page (lower = sorted to top).

no_traj.rule: CameraTrajectoryTransformed.txt missing, empty, or n_traj_frames < min_traj_frames
no_traj.description: Trajectory file missing or too short to compute motion

static.description: Trajectory exists but camera barely moved (<1 cm)

all_nan_gripper.rule: grip exists but all values are NaN (AprilTag never detected)
all_nan_gripper.description: Gripper file present but no finite values

flat_gripper.description: Camera moved but gripper signal has no actuation

display._doc: Page-rendering hints derived from categories but kept here for tuning without code edits.
